a: We serve factories, warehouses, process plants, PPA plants, Caustic Soda plants, and heavy industrial structures across Gujarat.

q: What coating systems do you apply?
a: We apply Epoxy, Polyurethane (PU), Alkyd, Zinc Rich Primer, and Chlorinated Rubber systems depending on the environment and substrate requirements.

q: Do you handle surface preparation as well?
a: Yes. Surface preparation — including sand blasting, grinding, rust removal, and chemical treatment — is a core part of every project we undertake.

q: How do you ensure safety on site?
a: We follow strict safety protocols on every site. All our workers are equipped with full PPE including safety helmets, harnesses, goggles, gloves, and safety shoes. We have maintained a zero safety incident record across all our projects.

q: Which companies have you worked with?
a: We have proudly served Nirma Pvt. Ltd. and Balarka Fabricon Pvt. Ltd. (site: Madhu Silica Pvt. Ltd.), among other clients across Gujarat.

q: How can I get a quote?
a: Simply fill out the contact form on our Contact page or call/WhatsApp us directly at +91 78188 11818. We will arrange a free site inspection and provide a detailed quotation.
